hypothesis: epochs 5→10 at composed #37 baseline. #9 showed catastrophic positive saturation (sens=1.000, spec=0.006) with epochs=10 at pre-#23 baseline, but that was on the weaker k=3 architecture and the longer 5s clips. k=7 (#23 win) + clip=3 (#37 win) may change saturation dynamics enough that extended training reaches a better discriminative optimum rather than corridor-collapsing. Two clean outcomes: (a) metric > #37 with balanced or moderately shifted sens/spec — 5 epochs was under-training for composed architecture, further sweeps warranted; (b) saturation like #9 — epochs=10 at lr=1e-3 is generically unworkable for this model regardless of architecture, closing the axis and strongly implicating lr as the real lever (→ epochs+lr compound next). ls reverted 0.1→0.0 to isolate.
